description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define a deploy stage with a job named pages that runs the exact commands: cd /builds/cn-ds/web-app, npm install, npm run build, mkdir www, mv public/* www/, rm -R public, mkdir public, mv dist/* public/. Configure the pages job to publish the public/ folder as an artifact and to run only on the master branch, deploying the result to GitLab Pages.
